meta.name: Global ReSet®
meta.heroTitle: Resettable Manual Call Point for International Mounting Standards
meta.heroDescription:
Resettable manual call points simulate break-glass activation without replacing the glass. Reset is performed with a key. Equipped with DPDT contacts (2 Form C) and a visual activation indicator. Available in two series: GLR for general-purpose systems and GR for certified fire alarm systems. Both series are manufactured from reinforced polycarbonate and designed for indoor use.

The GLR series is compatible with American and European back boxes (single and double gang) and is supplied for flush mounting; surface mount back boxes are available separately. Available in 5 colours with marking options in Ukrainian or English.

The GR series is designed for flush or surface mounting with an included distribution box, supports a single-pole SPC mechanism, and is supplied with a fire pictogram or FIRE marking.
